title: Hoppify
description: Fix your logistics and save your TPS. Hoppify adds a built-in 3x3 whitelist filter and high-speed stack transfers to every vanilla hopper.
body:
# Hoppify ♥

Let’s be honest: building massive item sorters is a headache. You spend hours placing hundreds of hoppers and complex redstone lines just to filter out a few items, only to realize your storage room is now a giant lag machine.

**Hoppify** fixes the logistics problem at the source. No more bulky sorters, no more placeholder items, and no more slow transfers.

---

## The Filter: Sorting Done Right
The heart of Hoppify is the **Integrated 3x3 Filter**. Every hopper now comes with a built-in side panel that completely replaces the need for traditional item sorters.

![filter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1IFzgeD4/images/616cf641d0b56b9f900b413ce3da9b2bd0b67933.png)

- **The Ghost Grid**: You don't need to "sacrifce" items to your sorter. Just tap any item into the filter grid to set it. It acts as a ghost slot—it knows what to look for without actually consuming your item.
- **Set and Forget**: Once you set your 3x3 grid, those settings are "sticky." They won't jump around, they won't reset on relogs, and they'll stay perfectly preserved even if you break the hopper and move it.
- **Pure Logistics**: When there’s an item in the grid, the hopper becomes a specialized filter. It will only pull or push exactly what you want. If the grid is empty, it switches back to being a regular hopper—simple as that.

---

## Power & Performance

### Move Stacks, Save TPS
While other mods just make hoppers "faster" (which usually just means more lag), Hoppify focuses on **Volume**. 
Instead of checking for items 20 times a second, you can set your hoppers to move up to **64 items at once**. You get the same massive throughput as a "super-speed" hopper, but on a vanilla cooldown that won't tank your TPS.

### Smart Logic
Hoppify is built for stability. If you're transferring a stack of 64 into a chest that only has room for 12, the hopper will intelligently deposit the 12 and keep the rest. **No items lost, no duplicates—just clean, reliable logistics.**

### Fully Configurable
Everything—from the filter toggle to the specific transfer speeds—is handled in a clean, stylized config file in your `serverconfig` folder. Customize it to fit your server's needs in seconds.

![serverconfig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1IFzgeD4/images/e4cb8783738834629f76c118aedca2542d15dac1.png)

---
*Developed with love by BoboTweaks*
